title: Optomerized
description: Based on Fabulously Optimized with additional quality-of-life mods.
body:
A Fabric Minecraft modpack based on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), focusing on performance and graphics enhancements, but with additional mods, some removed mods, included quality-of-life resource packs, and nicely preconfigured options.

### Additional Mods
- Better Ping Display
- Dark Loading Screen
- Don't Clear Chat History
- EMI
- EMI Loot
- Food Effect Tooltips
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- Highlight
- Monsters in the Closet
- No Resource Pack Warning
- Peek
- Status Effect Bars

### Included Resource Packs
- [Vanilla Tweaks (Version #5L1zqQ)](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#5L1zqQ)

### Recommended Resource Packs (Not Included)
- [Non Obstrusive Glow Lichen](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/non-obtrusive-glow-lichen)
- [Descriptive Books](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/descriptive-enchanted-books/)

### Removed Mods
- Fabrishot
- No Chat Reports
- Controlify
- AntiGhost
